title: Biofuels Groups File Opening Supreme Court Brief on Small Refinery Exemptions
content: Growth Energy and the Renewable Fuels Association (RFA) today filed their opening brief in the U.S. Supreme Court in Environmental Protection Agency v. Calumet Shreveport Refining, LLC, Case No. 23-1229. The case seeks to overturn an opinion from the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit regarding the proper venue for adjudicating the U.S. Environmental Protection Agencyâ€™s (EPAâ€™s) denials of several petitions for small refinery exemptions (SREs) under the Renewable Fuel Standard (RFS).
author: Analysts Account
